description_long: This object is a realistic crab with a broad, slightly flattened carapace and two prominent claws extending forward. Its exoskeleton is mottled with shades of white, gray, and brown, giving it a natural, camouflaged appearance. The crab has ten legs, including the claws, with the walking legs splayed outward and slightly bent. Two long, slender antennae project from the front of the carapace, and its eyes are set on short stalks, providing a wide field of vision. The surface of the crab appears hard and slightly rough, typical of marine crustaceans. The overall form is compact, with a distinct cephalothorax and a tucked-under abdomen.
description: A realistic crab with a mottled hard shell, prominent claws, and long antennae, featuring a compact body and splayed legs.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the crab's claws, antennae, and wide carapace.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the body and the arrangement of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the carapace and the legs extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the other profile of the crab and the tucked abdomen.
